description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ESP8266 Arduino CI that runs on every pull request. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: build-linux, build-debug-ipv6, build-windows, build-mac, build-pio, host-tests, documentation, style-check, mock-check, and boards-check. Each job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.x, and runs specific scripts for building, testing, and checking the ESP8266 Arduino project.
